name: Doubao
description: ByteDances flagship LLM family (豆包/Seed) served via Volcano Engine Ark for chat, vision, video, and agent tasks.

seo.title: Doubao — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Doubao: ByteDances flagship LLM family (豆包/Seed) served via Volcano Engine Ark for chat, vision, video, and agent tasks.

when_to_use: Building AI applications on ByteDance's hosted LLM platform
Accessing multimodal models for image and text tasks in China
Running low-latency LLM inference for high-volume consumer apps
Prototyping Chinese-language AI features with Doubao API

pros: Wide modality coverage — chat, vision, video
Low per-token pricing via Volcano Engine
cons: Policy changes can shift access rules
review.verdict: Top-tier model access inside China; mostly a non-starter for Western production.
review.best_for: Chinese developers running multimodal apps on Volcano Engine
review.not_for: Western teams with GDPR, HIPAA, or residency constraints

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based pricing scales up and down
